name: Icare Transportation SVC LLC
registry_source: SC Public Service Commission Docket 2022-324-T (Class C Non-Emergency Certificate); Kompass/OMSMB business listing
notes: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation (NEMT) operator in Bluffton/Beaufort County, SC, founded 2022. Certified by SC Public Service Commission and Office of Regulatory Staff (Class C Non-Emergency). Veteran-owned. Listed at 275 Pinecrest Cir, Bluffton, SC 29910; phone 843-263-1053; website icaretransportsc.com. Not a school bus operator per se — primarily NEMT (medical, dialysis, ADC, behavioral health). Multiple FMCSA SAFER searches for ICARE TRANSPORTATION SVC, ICARE TRANSPORTATION, and ICARE returned no SC match (the only ICARE TRANSPORT LLC result is unrelated entity in Fair Oaks, CA, USDOT 2927259). No USDOT consistent with intrastate-only NEMT operations under SC PSC jurisdiction.

name: Corporate Limousine Svc
fmcsa_status: no USDOT found at this FL address (likely intrastate)
registry_source: FL Sunbiz searched; no direct match at 3588 Collins Ave Miami Beach 33140
notes: Could not confirm an active FL entity named 'Corporate Limousine Svc' at 3588 Collins Ave #503, Miami Beach, FL 33140. FMCSA SAFER searches for 'CORPORATE LIMOUSINE', 'CORPORATE LIMOUSINE SERVICE', and 'CORPORATE LIMO' returned no FL matches; the only USDOT hit (1889078 CORPORATE LIMOUSINE SERVICE LLC dba BLACK TIE LIMOUSINE) is a Minnesota intrastate carrier in Bloomington, MN — not this entity. Sunbiz searches did not surface an active 'Corporate Limousine' record at this Miami Beach address. Likely a small intrastate FL limo/sedan service (TNC/luxury car) operating under FL PSC/Public Vehicle for Hire regs rather than FMCSA. Not student transportation. Address (3588 Collins Ave) is a Miami Beach condo/apartment tower so could be a home/mail address for an owner-operator.

name: School Bus System
fmcsa_status: no USDOT (likely intrastate or mailing-address shell)
registry_source: CA SOS bizfile (no clear hit); LA Office of Finance BTRC dataset
notes: FMCSA SAFER searches for 'SCHOOL BUS SYSTEM' returned no records. Address 244 S San Pedro St # 308, Los Angeles, CA 90012 is the Japanese American Cultural & Community Center (JACCC) office building in Little Tokyo — a multi-tenant office building used by many small nonprofits/businesses. Yelp listing for 'School Bus System' at this address exists but with no public profile detail. CA SOS bizfile search did not return a confirmed 'School Bus System' corporation match. The street address appears to be a mailing/back-office suite, not a bus yard, suggesting either (a) a dispatch/brokerage shell, (b) an inactive trade name, or (c) a misnamed entity. If operating school buses in CA, would require CHP SPAB or PSC TCP authority — not located in search. Likely intrastate-only, very small, or defunct. No FMCSA registration.

name: Drakeford Transportation Svc

notes: Listed as 'Drakeford Transportation Services G & S' at 3 Franklin Ave, West Orange, NJ 07052, phone (973) 325-2258 — categorized as Transportation Consultants. Christopher Drakeford is listed as a resident at 3 Franklin Ave, West Orange, NJ 07052-6103 (same address as the business — home-based small operator). FMCSA SAFER searches for 'DRAKEFORD' and 'DRAKEFORD TRANSPORTATION' returned no records. No USDOT. Likely small intrastate NJ paratransit/school transport contractor (potentially Type S vehicles under NJ MVC commercial bus inspection regs). No NJ Sec of State business registry detail directly accessible (njportal entity search behind validation). Not on FMCSA L&I. Address '3 Franklin Ave, West Orange' is a residential property, confirming small home-based operation.

name: Hurrah Inc Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: CA SOS bizfile (no public hit via Google site search); name appears truncated from CA foreign-qualification format
notes: Listed name 'Hurrah Inc Which Will Do Bus' is a truncation of the standard California foreign-qualification suffix 'Which Will Do Business In California As [DBA]' — indicating a foreign (out-of-state) corporation registered to do business in CA under a DBA whose full string was clipped. FMCSA SAFER searches for 'HURRAH' and 'HURRAH INC' returned no records. Address 5959 W Century Blvd # 554, Los Angeles, CA 90045 is a Hyatt Place/Hyatt House LAX hotel complex — Suite 554 is highly likely a private mailbox/registered-agent maildrop or virtual office, not an operating yard. No California SOS bizfile public record surfaced via Google site: search; no LA city business tax certificate hits. Could be a dormant or foreign-domiciled shell, or possibly a holding entity for an out-of-state operator. No school bus operation evidence located. The 'Which Will Do Bus' fragment was likely truncated in the source list, not necessarily a school-bus reference.
